rows.label: tlk4450018501_msg0001
rows.name:
I've made my decision. I'll
correctly pass on that history
and the prince's will to everyone.

rows.label: tlk4450018501_msg0002
rows.name:
And let us steer those
stray sheep who disapprove
back on the right path.

rows.label: tlk4450018501_msg0003
rows.name:
It has been some time since I have
preached anything, but I will try my
hardest to convey the new teachings.

rows.label: tlk4450018501_msg0004
rows.name:
Of course, were it not for Zeke,
we could never have achieved all
this. Thank you, my child.
